V-M-025.checks: Every device lifecycle, anti-abuse detection, auto-rotation, cooldown and degraded-mode event writes an audit entry with stable event types and enough context for later investigation.
V-M-025.commands: cd backend && SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-with-enough-length DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY=dpFmfSVqfdAK3yx5MQV6Tcv35RZuw5MzaH0yhxJ01q0= PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -o addopts='' tests/test_device_audit_log.py -v

scenarios.scenario: Every device lifecycle event produces an audit record with device_id, user_id and event type
Anti-abuse event types are persisted and exposed by recent-event helpers
